name: instant-api — nats_auth_failures_total > 0 [NATS isolation breach]
description: Critical when any NATS credential-issuance failure fires. MR-P0-5 (NATS per-tenant isolation, 2026-05-20). Every failure here means a tenant's /queue/new landed in legacy_open mode instead of getting an isolated account JWT — i.e. that tenant is now sharing the unauthenticated NATS namespace with everyone else. Common causes: operator seed in the nats-operator Secret is out of sync with the running nats-server's operator JWT (rotate one without the other), or the resolver push subject is unreachable from the api pod. Source: instant.dev/internal/metrics.NatsAuthFailures counter — incremented inside queue.cred_issue_failed_fallback_legacy_open in api/internal/handlers/queue.go.

nrql.query: SELECT count(*) FROM Metric WHERE service = 'api' AND metricName = 'nats_auth_failures_total'
